cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Machine Learning Engineer position at MarketMuse. I saw your focus on deploying models into production and building scalable pipelines. This matches my recent work where I've been integrating AI agents into real-world applications.

I built ValoFenua, a real estate platform for French Polynesia. It runs a daily scraper that collects 1,300+ property listings and feeds them into an AI agent that estimates prices from live market data. I also built an automated job search pipeline with n8n, AI agents, and a dedicated MCP server. These are systems where AI does the heavy lifting, not just assists.

I also redesigned the installation process at my current company, EXAIL Robotics. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering (2026). I've followed MarketMuse's work in AI-driven content strategy and I'm interested in how you scale these models for global users.

Aodren Gloux

stack: Node.js, Express, JavaScript, TypeScript, Canvas API, WebGL, Firestore, DynamoDB, WebSockets, AI Infrastructure
experience_requise: 3-5+ years (Flexible: 'We care about what you can build, not how many years')
points_positifs: Poste très orienté IA et automatisation de workflows
L'entreprise valorise les projets concrets plutôt que les années d'expérience
Stack JavaScript/Node.js et APIs REST correspondant au profil
Projet ValoFenua prouve la capacité à gérer des pipelines de données et de l'IA
points_negatifs: Demande 3 à 5 ans d'expérience pour Node.js

commentaire: L'offre est idéale car elle privilégie la capacité à construire des produits techniques complexes plutôt que l'ancienneté, ce qui correspond parfaitement aux projets personnels d'Aodren.

Dear Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Product Associate role at MORROW. Your focus on integrating wearable data and third party APIs caught my attention, as I enjoy building systems that connect different data sources to create a seamless user experience.

I currently work at EXAIL Robotics where I develop core features in C++ and JavaScript. I also redesigned our installation process, reducing deployment time from 2 days to 2 hours. This 85% reduction made the system accessible to everyone on the team, not just technical experts.

On the side, I built ValoFenua, a full-stack real estate platform. It uses a daily scraper to collect data from over 1,300 listings and processes them through an AI agent to generate price estimates. This project required managing a React frontend, a PostgreSQL database on Supabase, and multiple automated workflows via n8n.

I am finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering and have a strong foundation in Computer Science. I am excited about the possibility of helping MORROW scale its digital health platform and improve member engagement through smart API integrations.
